ModMetaData.name: Sense of Urgency
ModMetaData.author: Zombie Phil
ModMetaData.description:
Adds a high-priority "Urgent" job category to make colonists prioritize urgent problems. No more colonists ignoring dead generators or going to bed while their colleagues are bleeding out on the floor.
Urgent jobs include: - Refueling empty generators - Refueling expired camp fires and passive coolers - Rearming empty turrets - Feeding starving patients and prisoners - Rescuing critical downed colonists - Charging flat mechs - Cutting blighted plants
Also adds the following optional behaviour (enable/disable in mod settings): - Doctors prioritize tending patients by need - Hunters prioritize target animals - strong hunters prioritize dangerous game and vice-versa
